entities.name: STREPTOMYCES GRISEOPLANUS SAI-25
entities.description: Bacterium isolated from rice rhizospheric soils used for the extracellular biosynthesis of silver nanoparticles

entities.name: SILVER NANOPARTICLES
entities.description: Nanoparticles synthesized using the extracellular extract of Streptomyces griseoplanus SAI-25, exhibiting antifungal activity

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHASEOLINA
entities.description: A polyphagus fungal pathogen that causes charcoal rot in sorghum

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Agricultural crop affected by the charcoal rot pathogen Macrophomina phaseolina

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Agricultural crop from whose rhizospheric soils Streptomyces griseoplanus SAI-25 was isolated

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERIC SOILS
entities.description: The soil environment surrounding plant roots from which Streptomyces griseoplanus SAI-25 was isolated

entities.name: INSECTICIDAL ACTIVITY
entities.description: A previously demonstrated property of Streptomyces griseoplanus SAI-25

entities.name: ANTIFUNGAL ACTIVITY
entities.description: The ability of silver nanoparticles to inhibit the growth of Macrophomina phaseolina

entities.name: FTIR
entities.description: Fourier-transform infrared spectroscopy used to confirm the presence of functional groups in the extracellular extract

entities.name: SEM
entities.description: Scanning electron microscopy used to analyze the size, shape, and composition of synthesized nanoparticles

entities.name: TEM
entities.description: Transmission electron microscopy used to analyze the size, shape, and composition of synthesized nanoparticles

entities.name: EDAX
entities.description: Energy-dispersive X-ray analysis used to analyze the composition of synthesized nanoparticles

entities.name: XRD
entities.description: X-ray diffraction used to analyze the composition of synthesized nanoparticles

entities.name: DLS
entities.description: Dynamic light scattering used to confirm the size of silver nanoparticles

entities.name: ZETA POTENTIAL
entities.description: A method used to confirm the characteristic negative charges of silver nanoparticles

entities.name: CHARCOAL ROT
entities.description: A fungal disease caused by the pathogen Macrophomina phaseolina in sorghum

entities.name: BIOPESTICIDES
entities.description: Biological agents used for pest and pathogen control to improve agricultural economy
